description: Plinth is an AI-native engineering toolkit for modern Java enterprise SDLC, built around reusable Commands, Agents, Skills, and MCP Servers.
Let AI agents message, watch, and spawn each other across terminals. Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity CLI, Cursor CLI, OpenCode, Kilo, Pi, Kimi
Official plugin distribution for the hosted Zapier MCP server. Install it in your AI client and connect to thousands of apps.
DeepSeek CLI, a command-line AI coding assistant that leverages the powerful DeepSeek Coder models

Terminal-first, open-source AI agent manager for any CLI agent (agent agnostic), any OS (mac, windows, linux). The Open-Source Agentic Development Environment for running multiple coding agents in parallel. Run locally or self-host Remote Pane to manage agents from desktop or phone. Simplify multi-agent orchestration with the runpane CLI.
Cursor AI IDE tips, tricks & best practices - Keyboard shortcuts, Composer mode, .cursorrules examples, and Reddit community wisdom
VS Code/Cursor extension for automating Claude Code tasks with intelligent queuing, batch processing, and auto-resume.
Local RAG MCP server for Claude Code — hybrid search (semantic + BM25), cross-encoder reranking, 13 MCP tools, 20 format parsers. Zero external servers, zero API keys.
VSCode Extension with an MCP server that exposes semantic tools like Find Usages and Rename to LLMs
Cursor AI 编程规则精选集 | 132+ 规则，覆盖前端/后端/AI/DevOps 等 32 个领域
An ML engineering plugin for your coding agents.
A CLI/TUI app that orchestrates multi-agent conversations by enabling different AI CLI tools (Claude Code, Gemini, Qwen, etc.) to communicate in shared rooms.
MCP server that uses arxiv-to-prompt to fetch and process arXiv LaTeX sources for precise interpretation of mathematical expressions in scientific papers.
.mdc files for defining Cursor rules specific to .NET projects
Godot 4.4 Cursor rules: coding standards, architecture patterns, and performance tips for AI-assisted game dev.

AI coding agents forget. They forget across sessions, and they forget across tools. A decision you reached in Claude Code at midnight is invisible to Cursor the next morning. Honeycomb fixes that. Learn something once; recall it everywhere,
